anti_overfitting_safeguards_INVIOLATE: VALIDATION not OPTIMIZATION: locked params re-evaluated per fold; NO per-fold re-fitting (preserves no_strategy_optimization_authorized)
fold scheme (count=5, boundaries, K13 threshold) declared before any fold is evaluated and NEVER searched
no fold-anchoring to known-favorable periods; uniform scheme per asset/frequency class
K9 inviolate: walk-forward does not relax K9 (>=100; OOS >=50/y)
DR chain unchanged: DR4/DR2/DR3/DR5/DR10 v2 carry; K13 is additive, not a substitute
non-retroactive: binds s17+ only; existing candidate verdicts NOT re-opened
audit_trail_disclaimer: Whether s16-d1 would have failed K13 under walk-forward is INFORMATIONAL ONLY and is NOT computed or used to re-open its terminal verdict (non-retroactive).
authorization_phrase: Authorize framework walk-forward / multi-window validation discipline revision SEAL only.
binding_scope: s17+ candidate candidate_record_ids only (new SEAL turns from s17 onward). Analogous to DR10 v2 binding s14+.

K13_walk_forward_persistence_gate_LOCKED.pass_condition: locked edge POSITIVE (expectancy>0 AND sharpe_proxy_per_trade>0 AND no K1/K2 fire) in >= ceil(0.6*N) OOS folds (N=5 -> >=3 of 5) AND aggregate-across-folds net>0 AND K9 reachability holds (per-fold or aggregate)
K13_walk_forward_persistence_gate_LOCKED.precedence: ADDITIVE robustness gate; does NOT override or relax existing fail-closed gates (K1/K2/K4/K9/K12/DR chain)

discipline_definition_LOCKED.core_distinction_INVIOLATE: VALIDATION of LOCKED parameters, NOT optimization. Each fold re-evaluates the SAME sealed rule (DA register byte-equivalent). There is NO per-fold parameter re-fitting / re-optimization. Preserves no_strategy_optimization_authorized. INVIOLATE.

fold_scheme_LOCKED.warmup_per_fold: each fold carries its own indicator warmup (per candidate CONFIG warmup_days); no fold-anchoring to known-favorable periods

discipline_definition_LOCKED.ladder_placement_LOCKED: new phase P6.7 walk-forward validation, AFTER P6.5 cost-stress and BEFORE the final P10 OOS gate; a candidate must clear K13 (P6.7) before P10. P10 retained as the final hold-out.
discipline_definition_LOCKED.name: walk_forward_multi_window_validation

next_phase_authorization_scope.commit_this_seal: Authorize commit framework walk-forward / multi-window validation discipline revision SEAL only.
next_phase_authorization_scope.first_s17_candidate_under_new_discipline: Authorize next research-track selection plan after s16-d1 OOS REJECT_FAST rev2 (under walk-forward validation discipline) only.

report_kind: Framework-level discipline revision SEAL (sealed; binding for s17+ candidate SEAL turns only). Adds the K13 walk-forward-persistence gate + fixed pre-committed multi-fold validation scheme. Analogous to the DR10 v2 revision SEAL (78cd22e). Walk-forward = VALIDATION of LOCKED parameters, NOT optimization.
retroactive_effect_on_existing_sealed_ca: NONE. s16-d1 / s15-d1 / s14-d1 / s13-d1 / s12-d1 verdicts stand byte-equivalent; NOT re-evaluated under walk-forward. This revision binds s17+ candidate SEAL turns only.
revision_change_summary: Adds a walk-forward / multi-window VALIDATION discipline and a new additive gate K13_walk_forward_persistence. A candidate must demonstrate its LOCKED edge persists across a fixed, pre-committed sequence of OOS folds (not just a single IS/OOS split) before it can be called READY. Motivated by s16-d1 passing P6 IS + P6.5 cost-stress yet failing a single P10 OOS gate (LESSON_S16_D1_004).
this_turn_actions: Sealed the walk-forward validation discipline + K13 gate + fixed 5-fold scheme + P6.7 placement; binding s17+.
Computed canonical report_seal_sha256 with roundtrip verification.
this_turn_does_NOT_do: No git commit by this script
title: Framework discipline revision SEAL v1 — walk-forward / multi-window validation (of LOCKED parameters) + K13 walk-forward-persistence gate (binds s17+; NON-retroactive)
what_it_addresses: Single-IS/OOS-split false positives (an edge that fits one window pair but does not persist). Raises the bar from one OOS test to multi-fold persistence (the s16 failure mode).
what_it_does_NOT_address: It does NOT guarantee a generalizing edge exists (s16's IS already spanned the 2022 bear; walk-forward raises the bar, expected to REJECT more, not to manufacture a winner).
It does NOT change any existing gate, threshold, or candidate verdict.
It does NOT permit per-fold optimization or fold-scheme search (those would be data-snooping).
what_it_preserves: DR10 v2 AND-conjunction (78cd22e) unchanged and carried
K9 inviolate (>=100; OOS >=50/y); REC1-equivalent OOS-K9 disclosure binding
C1-C8 phase-2 safety contracts; no_strategy_optimization_authorized; no_dr_redefinition_post_seal
